question: List all Book titles, ISBNs, and sale prices.
sql: SELECT Book.ISBN, Book.Title, Book.SalePrice FROM Book LEFT JOIN Books_Order ON Book.ISBN = Books_Order.ISBN WHERE Books_Order.ISBN IS NOT NULL OR Books_Order.ISBN IS NULL

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求列出所有书籍的标题、ISBN和销售价格，而SQL反向翻译的描述仅查询特定ISBN的书籍信息，过滤条件限制了ISBN的范围，导致结果不完整，与原始问题的意图不一致。
